title: salix × mantzii
intro: Salix × mantzii, also known as Mantschurian willow, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the Salix alba and Salix sachalinensis. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Salix × mantzii include its ability to reduce pain and fever, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, and is also used in some folk remedies to treat various conditions, including arthritis and skin irritations.
